steps.t: Aedh may be found in the crafting hall. You should speak with Aedh to learn if there is any way to reforge Penlhun's axe.
The mad dwarf dwells somewhere in the mountains surrounding Thrór's Coomb, far to the east of Lhanuch. Aedh told you to seek out a mad dwarf in the va…
Penlhun Brehur is at the Brenin's Hall in Lhanuch, far to the west of Thrór's Coomb. You should return to Penlhun with his father's axe.
